public_practice_name: Berwyn Oral Surgery (Hugh Marchmont-Robinson, DDS SC)
owner_operator_stated: Berwyn Oral Surgery is owned/operated by Hugh Marchmont-Robinson, DDS SC (oral & maxillofacial surgery) -- not 'Hammond Dental Group.'
notes: Record's practice name 'HAMMOND DENTAL GROUP' does not match any current occupant of 3302 Grove Ave, Berwyn. The record's exact phone (708) 788-8200 is confirmed via multiple independent directories to belong to Berwyn Oral Surgery, an oral & maxillofacial surgery practice owned by Hugh Marchmont-Robinson, DDS SC (vendor_website_hint berwynoralsurgery.com was directionally correct). A second, unrelated general-dentistry practice, Forever Dental (Dr. Diane Garrison, DDS), also occupies 3302 Grove Ave but uses a different phone, (708) 788-9414. A same-named 'Hammond Dental Group' chain exists but is based in Hammond, IN (hammonddent.com, phone 773-542-1916) and is unrelated to this Berwyn address -- likely a vendor name-matching error, not a genuine rebrand of this location.

owner_operator_stated: Site names Dr. Jonathan Oh as practice owner and Dr. Connor Schroyer as an associate dentist; no mention of Muna Sigdel anywhere on the site.
notes: Address (3218 Kenilworth Ave) and phone ((708) 795-1255, listed on the site as the 'Existing Patients' line) both match Westwyn Dental LLC's own site exactly, corroborating the site for this location -- but the current owner/associate dentists on the site are Jonathan Oh, DDS and Connor Schroyer, DMD, not Muna Sigdel. Muna Sigdel's LinkedIn shows a Berwyn, IL role from Aug 2021-Jul 2022, consistent with her having been a departed associate at this address; she is now practicing at Premier Dental in New York City. Flagged ownership_conflict because the record's named individual is no longer affiliated with the practice at this address/phone.

owner_operator_stated: Site's homepage names Scott M. Rysz, DDS and Thomas J. Rysz, DDS under 'Our Dentists.'
notes: Corroborated by street address: mypdltd.com states '6725 Stanley Ave., Berwyn, IL 60402,' matching the record exactly, and the practice name matches the record verbatim. Note: the record's listed phone, (708) 795-0190, is NOT Precision Dental's number -- their own contact page lists 708-484-0255. Third-party listings attribute (708) 795-0190 to a different dentist, Ralph K. Erdman, DDS (oral surgery), apparently at a different suite in the same 6725 Stanley Ave building. Treated as a vendor phone-data error rather than a true ownership conflict since the practice name and address both match Precision Dental directly on its own site. No careers/hiring page found.

owner_operator_stated: cresthilldental.com identifies the practice as 'Scott D. Beallis, D.D.S., Ltd.' with no mention of Thomas Braun.
notes: Record's exact phone, (815) 729-9668, matches Scott D. Beallis, D.D.S., Ltd. (general dentistry, Suite A) at 2312 Plainfield Rd, Crest Hill -- confirmed directly on cresthilldental.com (the vendor_website_hint Cresthilldental.Com was directionally correct for the phone, but not for the practice name), which does not mention Thomas Braun anywhere. Separately, a periodontics practice at the same street address, formerly Thomas B. Braun DDS, now operates as Soltani Periodontics & Implant Dentistry (phone (815) 744-7175 per Yelp/search listings, which still list Dr. Thomas Braun alongside Dr. Leila Soltani) -- a likely practice merger/succession, but under a different phone number than the record's. Neither current occupant of the building is a 'Thomas B Braun DDS PC' general practice matching the record's phone, so this is flagged ownership_conflict.

public_practice_name: South Suburban Family Dental (South Suburban Dental & Sleep Center)
owner_operator_stated: Multiple corroborating listings (Yelp, patientconnect365, Blue Island Area Chamber of Commerce) identify Dr. Mark W. Anderson, DDS as the practice's dentist/owner at this exact address and phone.
notes: Practice name/address/phone (2320 Walnut St, Blue Island, (708) 371-3311) all match the record exactly across multiple independent directory sources, and the practice's own domain (ssfamilydental.com, including a 'Meet the Team' page) appears live and current, but the site could not be directly loaded on this run due to a TLS certificate error (ERR_TLS_CERT_ALTNAME_INVALID) on our end -- findings rely on corroborating third-party search snippets rather than a direct page fetch. No careers/hiring page could be confirmed. Single-doctor general/family dental practice, not a multi-location DSO.

Practice name, address (313 E. River Oaks Dr, Calumet City, IL 60409), and phone ((708) 862-2328) all match the record exactly on the practice's own Calumet City office page. This is a multi-location group practice, Family Dental Care, PC -- 7-8 offices across Oak Lawn, Evergreen Park, Calumet City, South Chicago, East Side/Chicago, Crestwood, and Munster, IN. The careers page is organization-wide (not written specifically for Calumet City) but explicitly lists Calumet City among its offices, and the staff directory (meet-the-staff) confirms it is organized per-location, though the specific per-office roster content was not retrievable -- only one named dentist (Alexander G. Alemis, DDS) was directly confirmed on the Calumet City office page itself.
